case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. AQUILES SILVA ARRUDA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-27-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARRUDA, AQUILES SILVA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CENDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AQUILES DE SILVA ARRUDA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $641.47 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ARRUDA, AQUILES SILVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARRUDA, AQUILES SILVA $641.47 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $721.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
